facebook.caption: Phu Quoc will wear you out. The heat, the scooters, the full days. MiDu Foot & Body Massage on Đường Bạch Đằng is where you reset. 4.6 stars across 204 reviews. Feet that carried you through beaches and markets finally get some attention. Book a session, go limp for an hour, leave a different person. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sinking into a massage chair at MiDu Foot & Body Massage Phu Quoc after back-to-back beach days. 4.6 stars, 204 reviews, and your legs will tell you why. Tag your travel buddy who needs this.

instagram.caption: Phu Quoc will wreck your legs. MiDu Foot & Body Massage fixes that. 4.6 stars, 204 reviews. Save this.
